config.mapdistancefix.option.distanceFor:
Format string for distance display. Use ％d for the distance value.
Example: "％dm" displays as "100m"
config.mapdistancefix.option.shortUnitTh: Distance in blocks at which to start using short units
config.mapdistancefix.option.showDistanc: Show distance to map center on player icons
Also show distance when player is within map boundaries
Display distance when player is outside map boundaries
config.mapdistancefix.option.showStructu: Show distance to the nearest structure (mansion, monument, village, etc.) below the player arrow instead of distance to the map center
config.mapdistancefix.option.useShortUni: Use abbreviated units (e.g., "1.5k" instead of "1500m") for large distances
config.mapdistancefix.title: Map Distance Fix Settings
